taxonomy: Entadopsis rotundifolia is classified as a species of legume in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. It belongs to the genus Entadopsis, which comprises several species of legumes. Entadopsis rotundifolia is further classified as a member of the tribe Phaseoleae, which includes various species of beans and peas. This classification indicates that Entadopsis rotundifolia shares characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other legumes in the Fabaceae family. The classification of Entadopsis rotundifolia provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
